justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted all temporal expressions, including specific times and broader timeframes.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent handled unavailability by proposing alternative times, though it could have offered more options in the first unavailable instance.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently gathered information and made appropriate API calls without unnecessary turns or redundant questions.
justifications.customer_experience: The customer experience was mostly positive, with the agent maintaining a helpful tone and successfully booking the appointment.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent recovered gracefully after initial unavailability, maintaining context and intelligently expanding the search for new slots.
